verse.verse_1: Qul ūḥiya ilayya annahustama‘a nafarum minal-jinni fa qālū innā sami‘nā qur'ānan ‘ajabā(n).
verse.verse_2: Yahdī ilar-rusydi fa'āmannā bih(ī), wa lan nusyrika birabbinā aḥadā(n).
verse.verse_3: Wa annahū ta‘ālā jaddu rabbinā mattakhaża ṣāḥibataw wa lā waladā(n).
verse.verse_4: Wa annahū kāna yaqūlu safīhunā ‘alallāhi syaṭaṭā(n).
verse.verse_5: Wa annā ẓanannā allan taqūlal-insu wal-jinnu ‘alallāhi każibā(n).
verse.verse_6: Wa annahū kāna rijālum minal insi ya‘ūżūna birijālim minal-jinni fa zādūhum rahaqā(n).
verse.verse_7: Wa annahum ẓannū kamā ẓanantum allay yab‘aṡallāhu aḥadā(n).
verse.verse_8: Wa annā lamasnas-samā'a fa wajadnāhā muli'at ḥarasan syadīdaw wa syuhubā(n).
verse.verse_9: Wa annā kunnā naq‘udu minhā maqā‘ida lis-sam‘(i), famay yastami‘il-āna yajid lahū syihābar raṣadā(n).
verse.verse_10: Wa annā lā nadrī asyarrun urīda biman fil-arḍi am arāda bihim rabbuhum rasyadā(n).
verse.verse_11: Wa annā minnaṣ-ṣāliḥūna wa minnā dūna żālik(a), kunnā ṭarā'iqa qidadā(n).
verse.verse_12: Wa annā ẓanannā allan nu‘jizallāha fil-arḍi wa lan nu‘jizahū harabā(n).
verse.verse_13: Wa annā lammā sami‘nal-hudā āmannā bih(ī), famay yu'mim birabbihī falā yakhāfu bakhsaw wa lā rahaqā(n).
verse.verse_14: Wa annā minnal-muslimūna wa minnal-qāsiṭūn(a), faman aslama fa ulā'ika taḥarrau rasyadā(n).
verse.verse_15: Wa ammal-qāsiṭūna fa kānū lijahannama ḥaṭabā(n).
verse.verse_17: Linaftinahum fīh(i), wa may yu‘riḍ ‘an żikri rabbihī yasluk-hu ‘ażāban ṣa‘adā(n).
verse.verse_18: Wa annal-masājida lillāhi falā tad‘ū ma‘allāhi aḥadā(n).
verse.verse_19: Wa annahū lammā qāma ‘abdullāhi yad‘ūhu kādū yakūnūna ‘alaihi libadā(n).
verse.verse_20: Qul innamā ad‘ū rabbī wa lā usyriku bihī aḥadā(n).
verse.verse_21: Qul innī lā amliku lakum ḍarraw wa lā rasyadā(n).
verse.verse_22: Qul innī lay yujīranī minallāhi aḥad(un), wa lan ajida min dūnihī multaḥadā(n).
verse.verse_23: Illā balāgam minallāhi wa risālātih(ī), wa may ya‘ṣillāha wa rasūlahū fa inna lahū nāra jahannama khālidīna fīhā abadā(n).
verse.verse_24: Ḥattā iżā ra'au mā yū‘adūna fasaya‘lamūna man aḍ‘afu nāṣiraw wa aqallu ‘adadā(n).
verse.verse_25: Qul in adrī aqarībum mā tū‘adūna am yaj‘alu lahū rabbī amadā(n).
verse.verse_27: Illā manirtaḍā mir rasūlin fa innahū yasluku mim baini yadaihi wa min khalfihī raṣadā(n).
verse.verse_28: Liya‘lama an qad ablagū risālāti rabbihim wa aḥāṭa bimā ladaihim wa aḥṣā kulla syai'in ‘adadā(n).
